title: Finally Farmable Dyes
description: Grow vanilla flowers that produce essential dyes as crops.
body:
Requires FORGE

 

The following flowers can now be crafted into seeds and grown as crops:

 

  • Lily of the Valley
  • Orange Tulip
  • Allium
  • Blue Orchid
  • Dandelion
  • Pink Tulip
  • White Tulip
  • Cornflower
  • Poppy
  • Wither Rose
  • Azure Bluet
  • Oxeye Daisy
  • Red Tulip

 

Fully grown crops drop 1-4 flowers on harvest.

Now all dyes can be either directly farmed or crafted from those that can be.

 

FAQ

Q: Forge?
A: Forge.

Q: Can I include your mod in a video?

A: As long as you include a link to the mod/modpack (if it happens to be in one), absolutely

If anyone wants an easier way to chat or ask questions here's a Discord link: https://discord.gg/sKwS3c62uM
